title: Food poisoning - Canada.ca
content:
Food poisoning caused by bacteria such as Escherichia coli, Salmonella and Cyclospora. Also find information on illnesses like botulism and hepatitis A and E.

## Services and information
Causes, symptoms, risks, treatment, prevention, surveillance information and guidance for health professionals.
